recommendations.title: O.J.: Made in America
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the rise and fall of O.J. Simpson, whose high-profile murder trial exposed the extent of American racial tensions, revealing a fractured and divided nation.

recommendations.title: American Animals
recommendations.overview: Lexington, Kentucky, 2004. Four young men attempt to execute one of the most audacious art heists in the history of the United States.

recommendations.title: HOMECOMING: A film by Beyoncé
recommendations.overview: This intimate, in-depth look at Beyoncé's celebrated 2018 Coachella performance reveals the emotional road from creative concept to cultural movement.

recommendations.title: Wandering Stars
recommendations.overview: This film follows the making of Nekfeu's 3rd album, between Paris, Japan, Greece and the United States.

recommendations.title: Taxi to the Dark Side
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the torture practices of the United States in Afghanistan, Iraq and Guantanamo Bay, focusing on an innocent taxi driver in Afghanistan who was tortured and killed in 2002.

recommendations.title: The Untold History Of The United States
recommendations.overview: Oliver Stone charts the history of the United States from the Second World War to the present.

recommendations.title: Unknown Number: The High School Catfish
recommendations.overview: Vulgar, taunting texts blow up the phones of a teen and her boyfriend. Who's sending them — and why? This twisty documentary reveals the shocking answer.

recommendations.title: Apollo 11
recommendations.overview: A look at the Apollo 11 mission to land on the moon led by commander Neil Armstrong and pilot Buzz Aldrin.

recommendations.title: Harry Potter 20th Anniversary: Return to Hogwarts
recommendations.overview: An enchanting making-of story told through all-new in-depth interviews and cast conversations, inviting fans on a magical first-person journey through one of the most beloved film franchises of all time.
recommendations.director: Giorgio Testi, Casey Patterson, Eran Creevy, Joe Pearlman

recommendations.title: I Am Not Your Negro
recommendations.overview: Working from the text of James Baldwin’s unfinished final novel, director Raoul Peck creates a meditation on what it means to be Black in the United States.
